name: Exosuit
short_description: Exosuit is a dynamic shooter in a unique style, where focus is on maximizing fun of gameplay. Game has no plot and the emphasis is only on unbridled action and unusual visual style.
detailed_description:
Experience a world of unique style and gameplay in the spirit of old-school shooters. Exosuit is a first-person shooter inspired by games like DOOM and Quake. Aim of the game is not to make you delve into complex plot twists, but to fill your blood with adrenaline through dynamic and exhilarating gameplay. Take the most powerful gun in your hands and fight your way to the final boss!

Unique features of the game:
*Dynamic and driving gameplay;
*Unique visual style;
*Big replayability, due to the non-leniency of some levels;
*Unusual for the genre geometry of levels with an emphasis on platforming;



NOTE FOR WINDOWS 11 USERS:
For correct display of weapons the resolution of the game and your screen must be completely the same.
